message:
🌱 jaeger: Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub (#1229)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct jaeger namespace to observability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-2498-push-official-images-to-quay-io-in-addition-to-docker-hub",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub",
+    "description": "Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\n# Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?\n\nHigh availability and resiliency of Jaeger in production environments\n\n## Problem - what in Jaeger blocks you from solving the requirement?\n\nCurrently, the official images for"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- pushes official images to quay.io in addition to docker.io\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- addition of upload-to-quay script which pushes docker images to the quay.io platform\n```yaml\n+ docker push quay.io/jaegertracing/example-hotrod\nUsing default tag: latest\nThe push refers to repository [quay.io/jaegertracing/example-hotrod]\na93b60b49a79: Preparing\nunauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized\nError: Process completed with exit code 1.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Push official images to quay.io, in addition to Docker Hub\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- pushes official images to quay.io in addition to docker.io\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- addition of upload-to-quay script which pushes docker images to the quay.io platform",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "+ docker push quay.io/jaegertracing/example-hotrod\nUsing default tag: latest\nThe push refers to repository [quay.io/jaegertracing/example-hotrod]\na93b60b49a79: Preparing\nunauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized\nError: Process completed with exit code 1."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
